original.query: I just got invited to a gathering where people might share some heavy personal updates, and I’m debating whether to go or ask someone to keep me out of the loop about certain kinds of news. Based on what you know about my boundaries, what’s the specific kind of situation I tend to avoid and why would opting out make sense for me?
